kapsam: 486 K4 reslug aday saison cluster brown ale yeast (Adim 18d-pre Sprint D iptal)
3598 K3 default fallback belgian_strong_dark_ale duzeltmesi (Adim 18d-pre Sprint C, yanlis fallback) — Wyeast 1762/3787, WLP510/500/530/540 vb. dogru slug atama (dubbel/tripel/quadrupel)
603 K3 keyword-eslesen recete duzeltmesi (Adim 18d-pre Oncelik 1B, 14 YANLIS + tripel/strong_golden kritik problem)
diger cluster reslug aday (Sprint E sonrasi)
neden: K3 default fallback tek slug (belgian_strong_dark_ale) yanlis, raw.yeast keyword arama yetersiz (Wyeast 3787 trappist -> tripel olmaliydi default'a dustu). Maya bazli pattern ile dogru slug atama gerek.
atif: Adim 18d-pre Sprint C K3 default fallback bulgusu 03.05.2026 + Oncelik 1B K3 603 audit 04.05.2026

alt_grup_sonuclari.belgian_quadrupel: 15 sample, %93 dogru, KABUL — V19 0.000 paradoksu ML mimari sorunu (class weight), dataset temiz

yanlis_recete_listesi: rmwoods_9271 sorachi ace double wit -> witbier (FP double)
rmwoods_138337 belgium triple berry wheat -> fruit specialty (FP triple)
rmwoods_304971 not a tripel -> specialty (FP negatif baglam)
rmwoods_21057 sake rice blonde duvel dregs -> blonde
rmwoods_258330 functional starter for my duvel -> starter (bira degil)
rmwoods_46228 session quad -> session zone alti
hata_pattern_listesi: FP negatif/generic kelime: 'double', 'triple', 'not a X', 'X light', 'X starter', 'X clone'
Profile zone uyumsuz: Patersbier 4-5% ABV dubbel atandi, light versiyonlar strong_golden atandi
Pattern eksik: 'westy db' Westvleteren 12 kisaltmasi yakalamadi
Maya/recete konflikt: WLP530 + saison recete -> tripel atandi

2_negatif_baglam_reddi: 'X clone' -> X slug (clone uretim icin gecerli)
'double X' (X != belgian) -> X stil, dubbel degil
'triple X' (X != belgian) -> X stil, tripel degil

v19_quadrupel_0000_kayit.neden: Dataset temiz (manual audit %93). ML mimari sorunu — 47 recete cok az, V19 train/test split sonrasi test setinde model %0 isabet.
v19_quadrupel_0000_kayit.cozum_alani: Dataset disi, V19 retrain parametre ayari (class weight, oversample, focal loss). Adim 18d kapsami DEGIL, ayri sprint.
